---
title: "Yu-Chuan · Notes"
listing:
  id: notes-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: "MMM D"
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-tag">Reading log</div>
  <h1>Things I read, and what I made of them.</h1>
  <p>ML engineer based in Germany. I read across technical papers, social science, and anything in between. These are rough notes — thinking out loud, not polished essays.</p>
</div>
```

::: {.layout}

::: {.main-col}

::: {.section-label}
Recent notes
:::

::: {#notes-listing}
:::

:::

::: {.sidebar-outer}

```{=html}
<div class="sidebar-block">
  <div class="now-label">Currently reading</div>
  <div class="now-item"><div class="now-dot"></div><div class="now-text">The Alignment Problem — Brian Christian</div></div>
  <div class="now-item"><div class="now-dot"></div><div class="now-text">Flash Boys — Michael Lewis</div></div>
  <div class="now-item"><div class="now-dot"></div><div class="now-text">Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models (paper)</div></div>
</div>
<div class="sidebar-block" style="margin-top:1rem">
  <div class="now-label">Links</div>
  <div class="now-item"><div class="now-dot"></div><div class="now-text"><a href="https://github.com/your-username">GitHub</a></div></div>
  <div class="now-item"><div class="now-dot"></div><div class="now-text"><a href="https://linkedin.com">LinkedIn</a></div></div>
</div>
```

:::

:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

  // 1. If Quarto put the category filter in the margin sidebar, move it into
  //    the listing container so it appears below "Recent notes".
  var marginSidebar = document.getElementById('quarto-margin-sidebar');
  var listingContainer = document.getElementById('listing-notes-listing');

  if (marginSidebar && listingContainer) {
    var catTitle  = marginSidebar.querySelector('.quarto-listing-category-title');
    var catFilter = marginSidebar.querySelector('.quarto-listing-category');
    if (catFilter) {
      if (catTitle)  listingContainer.insertBefore(catTitle,  listingContainer.firstChild);
      listingContainer.insertBefore(catFilter, listingContainer.firstChild);
    }
    // Hide the now-empty sidebar
    marginSidebar.style.display = 'none';
  }

  // 2. Move per-post category tags from .metadata into .body (below description)
  document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post').forEach(function (post) {
    var cats = post.querySelector('.metadata .listing-categories');
    var body = post.querySelector('.body');
    if (cats && body) body.appendChild(cats);
  });

  // 3. Add colour classes to tags and filter buttons by text content
  var colorMap = [
    { keys: ['ml', 'tech'], cls: 'tag-ml' },
    { keys: ['paper'],      cls: 'tag-paper' },
    { keys: ['social'],     cls: 'tag-social' },
    { keys: ['phil'],       cls: 'tag-phil' }
  ];
  function applyColor(el) {
    var t = el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();
    colorMap.forEach(function (m) {
      if (m.keys.some(function (k) { return t.includes(k); })) el.classList.add(m.cls);
    });
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.listing-category, .category').forEach(applyColor);

});
</script>
```
